subcodes.first_line: The sun hath shone forth and the verses have descended, yet the people remain in manifest drunkenness, and the Face hath appeared from the prison's horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت الشمس و نزلت الایات و الناس فی سکران مبین و لاح الوجه عن افق السجن
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
